actual_tool_functionality: Premium and input-driven: uses product type, material, style/aesthetic, occasion/season, target buyer, personalization, price/quality positioning, tag strategy, tag count, and buyer-phrase controls to shape the result from the user's listing details.
output_quality: Output is not a generic tag dump; it creates Etsy-specific tag groups with rationale, final shortlist, copyable chips, and relevance-first notes.
organization: Organized into Final Etsy Tag Set, Primary Etsy Tags, Attribute-Based Tags, Long-Tail Buyer-Intent Tags, Occasion/Seasonal Tags, Material/Style Tags, Tags to Avoid, and Usage Tips.
tags_to_avoid_and_usage_tips: Present: avoid list covers unsupported materials, fake handmade/vintage/local/personalized/custom claims, unauthorized competitor terms, and ranking claims; usage tips reinforce review-first behavior.
seo_content_quality: Etsy-specific and Helpful Content safe: description, how-to, tips, FAQs, and disclaimer focus on real listing attributes, buyer intent, seasonal relevance, listing consistency, and avoiding unsupported claims.
non_affiliation: Clear: page description, FAQ, disclaimer, and output note state the tool is independent and not affiliated with or endorsed by Etsy.
no_guarantees: Clear: no ranking, traffic, sales, visibility, placement, marketplace approval, ads result, favorites, conversion, or search-volume guarantees are stated across metadata, FAQ, disclaimer, and output notes.
misleading_attribute_guidance: Pass: guidance explicitly says to use only truthful product attributes and avoid fake relevance, unsupported claims, competitor names, and misleading handmade/vintage/local/personalized/luxury/gift-ready wording.
noindex_rendering: Pass: built page renders robots noindex, follow and googlebot noindex, follow.
exact_reason: Approved for a future indexing batch because the tool now provides a differentiated Etsy tag workflow with meaningful controls, sectioned outputs, rationale, anti-spam safeguards, truthful-attribute guidance, Etsy non-affiliation, and no marketplace-performance guarantees while remaining noindex during this audit.
remaining_blockers: None for indexing approval; keep noindex until a separate indexing batch intentionally removes etsy-tag-generator from noindexToolSlugs.
